title: Unknown execution mode error in MCP workflow execution
symptom: When executing a workflow via the MCP integration, an error 'Unknown execution mode' is returned, and the execution remains queued with no input data.
applies_when: Using MCP integration to execute workflows
Multiple triggers are configured in the workflow
not_this_if: Only one trigger is used in the workflow
root_cause: The MCP integration requires that each workflow has only one trigger. When multiple triggers are present, the execution mode cannot be determined, leading to the 'Unknown execution mode' error and causing the execution to hang in the queue without input data.
fix_steps: Edit the workflow to use only one trigger
Choose the most appropriate trigger for your use case
Retry executing the workflow via the MCP integration
agent_instruction: Ensure the workflow has only one trigger before executing it via the MCP integration.
